[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=69", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "lit"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "A lightweight local-only version control prototype."
requires-python = ">=3.12"
dependencies = []

[project.scripts]
lit = "lit.cli:main"

[tool.setuptools]
package-dir = {"" = "src"}

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

item.aggregated_output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
from pathlib import Path

from lit.repository import Repository


def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="lit", description="Local-only version control.")
    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)

    init_parser = subparsers.add_parser("init", help="Initialize a lit repository.")
    init_parser.add_argument("path", nargs="?", default=".", help="Repository root.")
    init_parser.add_argument(
        "-b",
        "--branch",
        default="main",
        help="Name of the initial branch.",
    )
    init_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_init)

    add_parser = subparsers.add_parser("add", help="Stage files or directories.")
    add_parser.add_argument("paths", nargs="+", help="Paths to stage.")
    add_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_add)

    commit_parser = subparsers.add_parser("commit", help="Create a commit from the index.")
    commit_parser.add_argument("-m", "--message", required=True, help="Commit message.")
    commit_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_commit)

    log_parser = subparsers.add_parser("log", help="Show commit history.")
    log_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_log)

    status_parser = subparsers.add_parser("status", help="Show working tree status.")
    status_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_status)

    diff_parser = subparsers.add_parser("diff", help="Show diff against the last commit.")
    diff_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_diff)

    restore_parser = subparsers.add_parser("restore", help="Restore files from a commit.")
    restore_parser.add_argument("paths", nargs="*", help="Paths to restore. Restores the whole tree when omitted.")
    restore_parser.add_argument(
        "--source",
        default="HEAD",
        help="Revision to restore from.",
    )
    restore_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_restore)

    checkout_parser = subparsers.add_parser(
        "checkout",
        help="Restore the full tree from a revision without changing HEAD.",
    )
    checkout_parser.add_argument("revision", help="Revision to restore from.")
    checkout_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_checkout)

    for command_name in ("branch", "merge", "rebase"):
        command_parser = subparsers.add_parser(command_name, help=f"{command_name} (pending)")
        command_parser.set_defaults(handler=handle_not_implemented)

    return parser


def handle_init(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    target_root = Path(args.path).resolve()
    existed = (target_root / ".lit").exists()
    Repository.create(target_root, default_branch=args.branch)
    if existed:
        print(f"Reinitialized existing lit repository in {target_root / '.lit'}")
    else:
        print(f"Initialized empty lit repository in {target_root / '.lit'}")
    return 0


def handle_not_implemented(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    print(f"`lit {args.command}` is reserved but not implemented yet.")
    return 2


def handle_add(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    repository = Repository.discover(Path.cwd())
    staged = repository.stage(args.paths)
    print(f"staged {len(staged)} path(s)")
    return 0


def handle_commit(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    repository = Repository.discover(Path.cwd())
    commit_id = repository.commit(args.message)
    print(f"[{repository.current_branch_name()} {commit_id[:12]}] {args.message}")
    return 0


def handle_log(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    repository = Repository.discover(Path.cwd())
    history = repository.iter_history()
    if not history:
        print("No commits yet.")
        return 0
    for commit_id, record in history:
        print(f"commit {commit_id}")
        print(f"    {record.message}")
    return 0


def handle_status(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    repository = Repository.discover(Path.cwd())
    status = repository.status()
    if status.is_clean():
        print("nothing to commit, working tree clean")
        return 0

    print("Changes to be committed:")
    for path in status.staged_added:
        print(f"  added: {path}")
    for path in status.staged_modified:
        print(f"  modified: {path}")
    for path in status.staged_deleted:
        print(f"  deleted: {path}")

    print("Changes not staged for commit:")
    for path in status.modified:
        print(f"  modified: {path}")
    for path in status.deleted:
        print(f"  deleted: {path}")

    print("Untracked files:")
    for path in status.untracked:
        print(f"  {path}")
    return 0


def handle_diff(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    repository = Repository.discover(Path.cwd())
    diff_output = repository.diff()
    if diff_output:
        print(diff_output)
    return 0


def handle_restore(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    repository = Repository.discover(Path.cwd())
    restored = repository.restore(args.paths, source=args.source)
    print(f"restored {len(restored)} path(s) from {args.source}")
    return 0


def handle_checkout(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
    repository = Repository.discover(Path.cwd())
    restored = repository.restore(source=args.revision)
    print(f"checked out {len(restored)} path(s) from {args.revision}")
    return 0


def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
    parser = build_parser()
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
    return args.handler(args)

from __future__ import annotations

import os
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
sys.path.insert(0, str(ROOT / "src"))

from lit.commits import CommitRecord, commit_id, deserialize_commit, serialize_commit
from lit.repository import Repository


def test_init_creates_deterministic_repository_layout(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    repo = Repository.create(tmp_path)

    expected_dirs = (
        repo.layout.dot_lit,
        repo.layout.objects,
        repo.layout.blobs,
        repo.layout.trees,
        repo.layout.commits,
        repo.layout.refs,
        repo.layout.heads,
        repo.layout.tags,
        repo.layout.state,
    )
    for directory in expected_dirs:
        assert directory.is_dir()

    assert repo.layout.config.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == (
        '{\n  "default_branch": "main",\n  "schema_version": 1\n}\n'
    )
    assert repo.layout.head.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "ref: refs/heads/main\n"
    assert repo.layout.index.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == '{\n  "entries": []\n}\n'
    assert repo.layout.branch_path("main").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == ""
    assert repo.layout.merge_state.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "null\n"
    assert repo.layout.rebase_state.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "null\n"


def test_open_reloads_repository_state_and_objects(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    repo = Repository.create(tmp_path)
    payload = b"hello lit"

    object_id = repo.store_object("blobs", payload)
    reopened = Repository.open(tmp_path)

    assert reopened.current_branch_name() == "main"
    assert reopened.read_branch("main") is None
    assert reopened.read_object("blobs", object_id) == payload


def test_commit_serialization_is_deterministic() -> None:
    record = CommitRecord(tree="abc123", parents=("base1", "base2"), message="bootstrap")

    serialized = serialize_commit(record)

    assert serialized == (
        b'{\n  "message": "bootstrap",\n  "parents": [\n    "base1",\n    "base2"\n  ],\n'
        b'  "tree": "abc123"\n}\n'
    )
    assert deserialize_commit(serialized) == record
    assert commit_id(record) == commit_id(record)


def test_module_cli_init_is_runnable(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    result = subprocess.run(
        [sys.executable, "-m", "lit", "init", "repo"],
        cwd=tmp_path,
        env={**os.environ, "PYTHONPATH": str(ROOT / "src")},
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
        check=False,
    )

    assert result.returncode == 0
    assert "Initialized empty lit repository" in result.stdout
    assert (tmp_path / "repo" / ".lit" / "HEAD").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == (
        "ref: refs/heads/main\n"
    )

item.text: The current code already covers repository storage, staging, commit history, status, diff, and restore. I’m reading the remaining modules to see how much branch/merge/rebase groundwork already exists, so I can isolate the real implementation frontier.
I have enough context to shape the graph. I’m checking the serialization modules once so the plan can keep core object-model work isolated from CLI/tests/docs work.

After those converge, finish the prototype with integration-style CLI tests and, in parallel, publish a concise README and a simple static English website that explains the tool and its
